title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in tankers this week, Euronav declared an optional 319k dwt VLCC at Qingdao Beihai, with the vessel set to deliver in 3Q 2026 bringing their series to two at the yard. Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
